subject: Deploy dmaap-bc with downloaded certs
commit_message:
Deploy dmaap-bc with downloaded certs

This fixes the charts to properly install new SSL artifacts from AAF.
And we use the newest container version that uses cadi library to read
these artifacts.

Original Issue-ID: DMAAP-1401
Issue-ID: DMAAP-1424
Signed-off-by: Dominic Lunanuova <dgl@research.att.com>
Change-Id: I4d70716220a7f3e629762d3bef2149e3b0147133
(cherry picked from commit de7a02b8315cd614e8fe277675423872d490fbb6)

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Cherry Picked from branch master.

The following files contain Git conflicts:
* kubernetes/dmaap/components/dmaap-bc/resources/config/dmaapbc.properties
* kubernetes/dmaap/components/dmaap-bc/templates/deployment.yaml
* kubernetes/dmaap/components/dmaap-bc/values.yaml

I understand the proposal (extend dmaap bc certificate) but here we're pushing code that's never been tested against el alto.

I may have found why the gating is not working (see  so let's wait at least for proper gating)
